16.gl: to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense)
16.kj: make amazed, be astonied, (be an) astonish(-ment), (be, bring into, unto, lay, lie, make) desolate(-ion, places), be destitute, destroy (self), (lay, lie, make) waste, wonder.

16.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
16.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

16.gl: to prop (literally or figuratively); reflexively, to lean upon or take hold of (in a favorable or unfavorable sense)
16.kj: bear up, establish, (up-) hold, lay, lean, lie hard, put, rest self, set self, stand fast, stay (self), sustain.

17.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
17.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
17.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

17.gl: properly, wrap around, i.e. (by implication) to put on agarment or clothe (oneself, or another), literally or figuratively
17.kj: (in) apparel, arm, array (self), clothe (self), come upon, put (on, upon), wear.
breastplate, coat of mail, habergeon, harness. See H5630 (סִרְיֹן).
17.dv: or שִׁרְיֹן; and שִׁרְיָן; also (feminine) שִׁרְיָה; and שִׁרְיֹנָה; from H8281 (שָׁרָה) in the original sense of turning;

17.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
17.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.

17.gl: rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity)
a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
17.kj: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

18.gl: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)
18.kj: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, re

18.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
18.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
18.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

18.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
18.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).

18.gl: treatment, i.e. an act (of good or ill); by implication, service or requital
18.kj: [phrase] as hast served, benefit, desert, deserving, that which he hath given, recompense, reward.

18.gl: properly, a habitable spot (as desirable); dry land, a coast, an island

18.dv: or (fully) אוֹיֵב; active participle of H340 (אָיַב);

19.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
19.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

19.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
19.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
19.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

19.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
19.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

19.gl: the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement
19.kj: [phrase] east side(-ward), sun (rising), [phrase] west(-ward), window. See also H1053 (בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ).
19.dv: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant;

19.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
19.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

20.gl: to be the next of kin (and as such to buy back a relative's property, marry his widow, etc.)
20.kj: [idiom] in any wise, [idiom] at all, avenger, deliver, (do, perform the part of near, next) kinsfolk(-man), purchase, ransom, redeem(-er), revenger.
20.dv: a primitive root, to redeem (according to the Oriental law of kinship), i.e.

20.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
20.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

20.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
20.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
